message:
fix(core): correctness fixes across 13 data structure and algorithm modules

bocpd.rs:
- Clamp hazard_rate to prevent ln(0) = -inf → NaN propagation in
  Bayesian Online Change Point Detection

circuit_breaker.rs:
- Count failures when transitioning from HalfOpen state, preventing
  infinite half-open retry loops

differential_snapshot.rs:
- Change else-if to independent if-checks so multiple fields can be
  diffed in a single pass

error_clustering.rs:
- Guard against n=0 division in cluster distance calculations

exp_histogram.rs:
- Cap record_n loop iterations to prevent near-infinite loops on
  extremely large input values

fibonacci_heap.rs:
- Save next pointer before node mutation during consolidate, preventing
  use-after-mutation corruption of the doubly-linked list

hyperloglog.rs:
- Fix rho (leading zeros) calculation by removing incorrect bit-or
  that was inflating cardinality estimates

ingest.rs:
- Convert Vec→HashSet for pane dedup, improving O(n²) to O(n) lookup

policy.rs:
- Restructured policy evaluation logic for clearer precedence handling

snapshot_engine.rs:
- Defensive checks on snapshot metadata before allocation

treap.rs:
- Properly reuse existing slot when inserting a duplicate key instead
  of creating a dangling node

union_find.rs:
- Convert recursive path compression to iterative loop, preventing
  stack overflow on deeply nested union-find trees

wal_engine.rs:
- Add payload size validation before allocation to prevent OOM on
  corrupted WAL entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
